channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: KPRC 2 Athlete of the Week: Sebastian Williams-Adams, St. John’s Basketball
item.description: Congratulations to the KPRC 2 and UTMB Health Athlete of the Week, St. John’s Mavericks senior star hooper Sebastian Williams-Adams.
item.dc:creator: Ari Alexander, KPRC 2

item.title: Ovechkin moves within 19 goals of breaking Gretzky’s NHL record, scoring in Capitals' OT loss
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Alex Ovechkin moved within 19 goals of breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record, scoring on a late power play in the Washington Capitals' 5-4 overtime loss to the Ottawa Senators on Thursday night. Ovechkin scored his 23nd goal of the season to push his career total to 876.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dick Button, Olympic great and voice of skating, dies at 95
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Dick Button was more than the most accomplished men’s figure skater in history. He was one of his sport’s great innovators and promoters, the man responsible not only for inventing the flying camel spin but describing it to generations of fans.
item.dc:creator: BARRY WILNER and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: McIlroy and Lowry come up aces, Scheffler back with a 67 and Henley takes Pebble Beach lead
item.description: PEBBLE BEACH, Calif. (AP) — Rory McIlroy and Shane Lowry decorated stunning views Thursday with a hole-in-one for each on different courses. Russell Henley birdied his last two holes for an 8-under 64 and the lead. And there was Scottie Scheffler, looking very much like he was never away.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dick Button dies at 95; men’s figure skating legend was well-known Olympic commentator
item.description: In addition to winning two Olympic gold medals and five consecutive world championships, he helped transform a niche sport into the showpiece of every Winter Olympics.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: WNBA star who hurt Caitlin Clark's eye calls for league to 'take action' against Trump administration policies
item.description: Connecticut Sun player DiJonai Carrington declared it's time for WNBA players to “take action" in response to President Donald Trump's policies.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Victor Wembanyama is an All-Star, 1 of 6 1st-time selections
item.description: NBA coaches are obviously convinced: Victor Wembanyama is one of the league's very best players. The San Antonio star and reigning rookie of the year is an All-Star for the first time, one of the 14 players announced Thursday night as members of the reserve pool for the Feb.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: New Raiders coach Pete Carroll retains defensive coordinator Patrick Graham, AP source says
item.description: A person with knowledge of the decision says new Las Vegas Raiders coach Pete Carroll has retained defensive coordinator Patrick Graham.
item.dc:creator: Mark Anderson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Wichita’s Sam Stevens overcomes plane-crash sorrow, opens strong at Pebble Beach Pro-Am
item.description: Sam Stevens opened the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am by remarkably shooting 5-under 67 and trying not to worry about that plane from his hometown of Wichita, Kansas that ultimately crashed near Washington D.C.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: A Lim Kim opens 4-shot lead in 1st round of LPGA season opener
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — A Lim Kim shot a bogey-free, 7-under 65 on Thursday to take a four-shot lead in the opening round of the Hilton Grand Vacations Tournament of Champions, the LGPA Tour season opener. The 29-year-old Kim, a two-time winner on tour including the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Unusual betting patterns surrounding play of Terry Rozier in 2023 game with Charlotte investigated
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Unusual betting patterns surrounding the play of then-Charlotte Hornets guard Terry Rozier in a game nearly two years ago are now under investigation by federal prosecutors, part of the same probe that led to the lifetime ban of Toronto Raptors player Jontay Porter, the NBA confirmed Th
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Max Scherzer agrees to a $15.5 million, 1-year contract with the Toronto Blue Jays, AP source says
item.description: Max Scherzer is joining the Toronto Blue Jays, agreeing to a 15.5 million, one-year contract, according to a person with direct knowledge of the deal.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: No Super Bowl rally if Kansas City Chiefs beat Philadelphia Eagles: Sources
item.description: Multiple sources have confirmed that should the Kansas City Chiefs win Super Bowl LIX, there will be no rally for the public.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: ESPN exercises option extending media base-rights agreement with the ACC through 2035-36
item.description: ESPN has exercised its option to extend a base-rights media deal with the Atlantic Coast Conference through 2035-36, aligning the timeline with a second deal that covers their partnership for the ACC Network.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: What to know about the 50th Charlie Wedemeyer Santa Clara County all-star football game
item.description: SJSU football coach Ken Niumatalolo was the keynote speaker at the annual banquet held in honor of the late Los Gatos coach who fought ALS.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Big Ten football projections for 2025: Penn State’s the pick with Ohio State and Oregon close behind, UW, USC and UCLA back in the pack
item.description: The Nittany Lions are the Hotline's early favorite to win the Big Ten after stealing DC Jim Knowles from Ohio State.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Wisconsin's Fourqurean files injunction saying Division II years shouldn't count against eligibility
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — Wisconsin cornerback Nyzier Fourqurean has filed an injunction saying the two seasons he played at Division II program Grand Valley State shouldn’t count against his college eligibility.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 14 from figure skating community killed in plane crash, six of them from Boston club
item.description: Two young figure skaters, two of their parents and two highly-regarded Russian figure skating coaches were among those killed after an American Airlines flight collided with an Army helicopter and crashed into the frigid waters of the Potomac River.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Teen figure skaters and their coaches, group of hunters and students among victims of air crash
item.description: Passengers aboard the American Airlines flight that collided with an Army helicopter and crashed into the Potomac River included athletes returning from the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: World champion Russian figure skaters aboard flight involved in midair collision, Kremlin says
item.description: Russian figure skating pair Evgenia Shishkova and Vadim Naumov were among those on board when an American Airlines flight collided with a U.S. Army helicopter, the Kremlin said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boys Basketball: San Marcos 82, Poway 48
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys Basketball at Poway on Tuesday evening with the Titans hosting San Marcos. The Titans were down 22-18 at the end of the 1st, but down 13 at the break and San Marcos kept the pedal to the metal and pulled off in the 2nd half and won 82-48.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Girls Basketball: Westview 54, Mission Hills 53
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls hoops in San Marcos on Tuesday night with the Grizzlies hosting Westview. Wolverines win a nail biter 54-53.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl LIX will be 'No Drone Zone' amid incursions
item.description: Airspace over the Caesars Superdome in New Orleans will be heavily restricted from drones during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: Bulls bench big in 129-121 win over Nuggets
item.description: Nikola Vucevic had 20 points, 10 rebounds and six assists, and the Chicago Bulls handed the Denver Nuggets their second straight loss with a 129-121 victory on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: NASCAR Chicago Street Race tickets go on sale Monday
item.description: CHICAGO — Tickets for the NASCAR Chicago Street Race go on sale to the public Monday. The third edition of Chicago Street Race Weekend will be back downtown from July 5-6, capping off the Fourth of July holiday.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC ends road trip with 3-1 loss at Ottawa
item.description: OTTAWA (ABC4 Sports) - Leevi Merilainen made 34 saves, and the Ottawa Senators won 3-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Canadian Tire Centre on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Bears are hiring Dennis Allen as new DC
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears are hiring former New Orleans Saints head coach Dennis Allen as their new defensive coordinator, according to the NFL Network's Ian Rapoport.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bills cornerback Christian Benford ruled out of AFC title game vs. Chiefs with a concussion
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Buffalo Bills cornerback Christian Benford was ruled out of the AFC title game against the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday night with a concussion.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ohio State celebrates national championship run amid change and farewells
item.description: Fans braved 30-degree temperatures to welcome home a team that beat five top-10 rivals on its way to the title, including Oregon in the Rose Bowl, Texas in the Cotton Bowl and Notre Dame in the College Football Playoff championship game.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE KRAFT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Harris English holds off Sam Stevens by a shot in the Farmers Insurance Open at Torrey Pines
item.description: Harris English held off hard-charging Sam Stevens to win the Farmers Insurance Open by one shot, securing his fifth career PGA Tour victory with a 1-over 73 in challenging weather.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: USU improves to 18-2 after blowout win at Air Force
item.description: COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah State basketball team continues to roll through the Mountain West Conference. The Aggies improved to 8-1 in league play, 18-2 overall, picking up an 87-58 road win over Air Force at Clune Arena.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Student stampede injures several ahead of AU vs. Tennessee basketball game
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (WRBL) – A chaotic scene unfolded Saturday morning outside Neville Arena as Auburn University students rushed to secure spots for the highly anticipated basketball game between #1 Auburn and #6 Tennessee.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth White, NewsNation

item.title: Chicago faces Philadelphia on 4-game home slide
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (16-27, 11th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (19-26, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Bulls -3.5; over/under is 230.5 BOTTOM LINE: Chicago hosts Philadelphia looking to stop its four-game home slide.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Australian Open: Keys upsets 2-time champion Sabalenka in women's final for 1st Grand Slam title
item.description: When Madison Keys stepped into Rod Laver Arena at 7:37 p.m. on Saturday night ahead of the Australian Open final, she strode right past the Daphne Akhurst Memorial Cup, the trophy that goes to the women's champion and was placed on a pedestal near the entrance to the court.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Winnipeg hat trick sinks Utah HC, 5-2
item.description: WINNIPEG (AP) - Three goals ended Utah's three-game winning streak. Cole Perfetti scored his first NHL hat trick, including the go-ahead goal, for the Winnipeg Jets in a 5-2 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Canada Life Centre on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fruita Wildcats dominate both ends of the court in rivalry showdown
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The Fruita Monument High School Wildcats girls’ basketball team continued their dominant form Tuesday night, following a blowout win over Central with a convincing victory over the Palisade Bulldogs.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: SZA to join Kendrick Lamar for Super Bowl LIX halftime show
item.description: Apple Music released a teaser trailer on Thursday showing the Compton native on the gridiron, assessing the field before the big game while he's talking to someone on the phone.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, Fox 5
